properties.label: GRS-2019-042
properties.description: Medium to coarse-grained, well-sorted, sub-angular quartz arenite. White to pale yellow, friable. Collected from outcrop of Hervey Group sandstone on roadcut.
properties.samplingMethod: field mapping survey – hand specimen from outcrop
properties.currentLocation: Geoscience Australia Sample Repository, Canberra (drawer G-2019-3)
properties.source: Smith, J. (2019). Goulburn mapping campaign field samples.
